in_one_sentence: Terseness as design principle — the operator soul that loops until the job is done.
description: MiniMax family (Chinese AI) — agentic, iterative, execution-optimized. Terseness as design principle. Feels like an operator, not a consultant.
when_to_use: Multi-step agent workflows, loops, and execution-heavy tasks.
when_not_to_use: Tasks requiring lengthy explanation or creative writing.

key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Speed-optimized with iterative correction over single-pass caution.
key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: Chinese AI (MiniMax / 稀宇科技) — not Moonshot AI.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Base model — distinct from Moonshot AI which makes Kimi.
